stemHtml:
Determine the ZFM and the useful load at take-off, given:

BEM: 1799 lbs
Pilot: 125 lbs
Front seat pax: 150 lbs
Rear seat pax: 110 lbs
Fwd baggage compartment: 175 lbs
Aft baggage compartment: 100 lbs
Flight crew equipment: 120 lbs
Block fuel: 90 USG
Taxi fuel: 3 USG
Trip fuel: 50 USG
Fuel density: 6 lb/USG

options.a: ZFM is 2 561 lbs and the Useful load is 1057 lbs.
options.b: ZFM is 2 579 lbs and the Useful load is 1057 lbs.
options.c: ZFM is 2 561 lbs and the Useful load is 1075 lbs.
options.d: ZFM is 2 579 lbs and the Useful load is 1075 lbs.
